Final A — budget moves (for Shwetanshu)

Bid actions per clinic for the current slice, Competitor ad pressure intentionally NOT folded in — that comes from Google Auction Insights (impression share, overlap, position-above rate by geo), which is the authoritative source. Ask: pull Auction Insights segmented by location for these clinics; scan-detected ad sightings remain available as an indicative tag only.

Keyword stuffing — separate report

Every listing in the current slice whose GBP name is keyword-stuffed (a guideline violation). Rivals here are report candidates — one enforcement action can drop them everywhere at once. Our own stuffed listings are the mirror risk: rank propped by a title rivals can report.

Final B — reviews & GBP moves (for Kishore)

Quick wins = cells flippable with a modest review push (target shown). Structural = rival closer AND dominant — a 1-year+ grind or a second-location question, not a campaign. Diagnostic = profile audits before anything else.
